heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly cloudy. Showers likely from the Champlain and Hudson valleys eastward, chance to the west; thunderstorm possible south of Route 4. Highs in the mid to upper 50s, some lower 50s in the northeast and in the Adirondacks. North to northeast 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly cloudy. Showers likely, again with a thunderstorm possible in the south. Patchy fog. Lows in the mid to upper 40s, with some lower 40s northeast and in the Adirondacks. Northeast winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Friday
text: Morning showers likely east of the Greens, chance west; then widely scattered in the afternoon, mainly over high terrain. Some afternoon clearing west of the Greens. Highs in the low to mid 60s, with some upper 50s in New Hampshire. Northeast winds 5 to 10 mph.
